description: A FOIA request seeks the following records: documents submitted by an NIH grant applicant.

_provenance.case_name: Physicians Committee for Responsible Medicine v. NIH
_provenance.record_description_quote: documents submitted by an NIH grant applicant
_provenance.outcome_quote: Exemption 5 could not be used to protect
_provenance.note: Grant applicants are not 'consultants' under Klamath — (b)(5) does not apply.
